summary: Plan-only PR inventory shard. The preflight artifact hydrated 18 open PRs and 7 refs failed live hydration due GitHub API rate limiting. No shared canonical was provided or inferred; no close, merge, fix, or label actions are planned. Hydrated PRs are classified independently for maintainer/backlog handling; unavailable refs need a refreshed run before classification.
